name: @zbluex/opencode-background-panel
description: OpenCode TUI plugin showing real-time background task list

scripts.build: bunx --yes shx mkdir -p dist/tui && bun build src/index.ts --outfile=dist/index.js --target bun --format esm --external @opencode-ai/plugin --external solid-js --external @opentui/solid && bun build src/tui/index.tsx --outdir=dist/tui --target bun --external solid-js --external @opentui/solid
